records.m_SubTitle_ENG: F Wing. Experimental and medical facilities.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: F Wing. Experimental and medical facilities.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: F Wing. Experimental and medical facilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's like a freezer here. The cold is piercing through my suit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's like a freezer here. The cold is piercing through my suit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's like a freezer here. The cold is piercing through my suit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You okay, chainsaw lady? You don't even have a coat on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You okay, chainsaw lady? You don't even have a coat on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You okay, chainsaw lady? You don't even have a coat on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Brrr... I-I'm not a fan of the cold, but I-I-I'm okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Brrr... I-I'm not a fan of the cold, but I-I-I'm okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Brrr... I-I'm not a fan of the cold, but I-I-I'm okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Instead of freezing to death, why not borrow our dead friend's suit?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Instead of freezing to death, why not borrow our dead friend's suit?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Instead of freezing to death, why not borrow our dead friend's suit?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, no. Th-the suit is soaked in blood...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, no. Th-the suit is soaked in blood...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, no. Th-the suit is soaked in blood...

records.m_Talk_ENG: a-a-and I can't control myself... when I smell blood...
records.m_Talk_DEU: a-a-and I can't control myself... when I smell blood...
records.m_Talk_FRA: a-a-and I can't control myself... when I smell blood...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're concerned about hygiene when you're freezing your socks off? That's some mentality you got there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're concerned about hygiene when you're freezing your socks off? That's some mentality you got there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're concerned about hygiene when you're freezing your socks off? That's some mentality you got there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, there are no signs of people here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, there are no signs of people here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, there are no signs of people here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are we just going to continue playing hide-and-seek in this massive place?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are we just going to continue playing hide-and-seek in this massive place?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are we just going to continue playing hide-and-seek in this massive place?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're going to use the surveillance cameras in F Wing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're going to use the surveillance cameras in F Wing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're going to use the surveillance cameras in F Wing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: While I restore the terminal, you guys set up the <color=#ffd34c>cradle</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: While I restore the terminal, you guys set up the <color=#ffd34c>cradle</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: While I restore the terminal, you guys set up the <color=#ffd34c>cradle</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Got it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Got it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Got it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Done.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Done.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Done.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The cameras... They're not connected to the central terminal and are all just linked locally...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The cameras... They're not connected to the central terminal and are all just linked locally...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The cameras... They're not connected to the central terminal and are all just linked locally...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are the control rooms separate for each zone? It seems like it's for security reasons, but this is rather inconvenient.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are the control rooms separate for each zone? It seems like it's for security reasons, but this is rather inconvenient.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are the control rooms separate for each zone? It seems like it's for security reasons, but this is rather inconvenient.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? This is...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? This is...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? This is...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Object Alpha - Response successful. Side effect of losing aggression detected. Discarding.../
records.m_Talk_DEU: Object Alpha - Response successful. Side effect of losing aggression detected. Discarding.../
records.m_Talk_FRA: Object Alpha - Response successful. Side effect of losing aggression detected. Discarding.../

records.m_Talk_ENG: Edwin...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Edwin...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Edwin...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A large C.O. in a place like this...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A large C.O. in a place like this...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A large C.O. in a place like this...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here they come!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here they come!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here they come!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit, why does this always happen at dead ends?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit, why does this always happen at dead ends?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit, why does this always happen at dead ends?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The <color=#ffd34c>cradle</color> will activate soon! We've sealed off all the gates, so just hold on a little longer!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The <color=#ffd34c>cradle</color> will activate soon! We've sealed off all the gates, so just hold on a little longer!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The <color=#ffd34c>cradle</color> will activate soon! We've sealed off all the gates, so just hold on a little longer!
